title: ESL Finals: Three ESC Teams are Crowned Champions
excerpt: It was a great year for ESC teams at Interclub with 3 of our own taking their division titles. The Bagel Factory won mixed level 1 (Abdel Elnady, Cory Shannon, Matt Mylod, Aleem Merali, Ryan Black and Mustafa Wida), Don’t Drink And Drive won Mixed Level 2 (Daniel Wynne, Bradley Salter, Isaac El-Hayek, Molli Hay, … Read more
content:
It was a great year for ESC teams at Interclub with 3 of our own taking their division titles. The Bagel Factory won mixed level 1 (Abdel Elnady, Cory Shannon, Matt Mylod, Aleem Merali, Ryan Black and Mustafa Wida), Don’t Drink And Drive won Mixed Level 2 (Daniel Wynne, Bradley Salter, Isaac El-Hayek, Molli Hay, Brooke Rothwell, Greg Bainbridge and Trevor Belanger), and Squashed Like a Bug took the Women’s Level 3 title (Jen Black, Brenda Haynes, Kristjana Bruveris, Anh Nguyen, Tanya Mundy, Shellaine Ulmer and C-Anne Robertson).
.
Congratulations also to Mixed Level 2 Squashaholics (Brad Prince, Leslie Lam, Jonathan Lacasse, Mike Soneff and Gerry O’Donnell) and Mixed Level 6 Rock Pile (Drew Lefebvre, Jon Rector, Daryn Hobal, Tim Dobson, Shane McCooeye and Tim Stolarz) for making the finals this year.

See you all next year!
